title: National Convention kicks off in Pretoria
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"NATIONAL NEWS - The long-awaited National Convention, which paves the way for the National Dialogue, has kicked off this morning at the University of South Africa (Unisa) in Pretoria.","html":"NATIONAL NEWS - The long-awaited National Convention, which paves the way for the National Dialogue, has kicked off this morning at the University of South Africa (Unisa) in Pretoria."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The two-day National Convention, in which stakeholders and representatives from all quarters of society will participate, aims to outline and agree on key themes for the National Dialogue.","html":"The two-day National Convention, in which stakeholders and representatives from all quarters of society will participate, aims to outline and agree on key themes for the National Dialogue. "},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The National Dialogue has been described by the Presidency as a call to action for citizens to lead an inclusive dialogue on the challenges facing the country."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Convention is also intended to agree on the approach and modalities for the nationwide public dialogues at sectoral and community level.","html":"The Convention is also intended to agree on the approach and modalities for the nationwide public dialogues at sectoral and community level. "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It will also outline and agree on the key themes for discussion in the National Dialogue and establish a Steering Committee.","html":"It will also outline and agree on the key themes for discussion in the National Dialogue and establish a Steering Committee."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Convention brings together representatives from government, political parties, civil society, business, labour, traditional leaders, religious leaders, cultural workers, sports organisations, women, youth and community voices, among others, to chart a way forward for the commencement of the National Dialogue.","html":"The Convention brings together representatives from government, political parties, civil society, business, labour, traditional leaders, religious leaders, cultural workers, sports organisations, women, youth and community voices, among others, to chart a way forward for the commencement of the National Dialogue."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In preparation for the first National Convention of the National Dialogue process, President Cyril Ramaphosa met with representatives of the interim Preparatory Task Team (PTT) on 7 August 2025.","html":"In preparation for the first National Convention of the National Dialogue process, President Cyril Ramaphosa met with representatives of the interim Preparatory Task Team (PTT) on 7 August 2025. "},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The task team has been given the responsibility of organising the convention and preparing for the public dialogues that will take place thereafter."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Since April 2025, a Preparatory Task Team has been responsible for preparing for the first National Convention.","html":"Since April 2025, a Preparatory Task Team has been responsible for preparing for the first National Convention."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It was established as an interim structure pending the establishment of a broadly inclusive Steering Committee representing all sectors. It has been composed of members of the foundations of struggle stalwarts and representatives of the President. – SAnews.gov.za","html":"It was established as an interim structure pending the establishment of a broadly inclusive Steering Committee representing all sectors. It has been composed of members of the foundations of struggle stalwarts and representatives of the President. – SAnews.gov.za"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: National Convention kicks off in Pretoria
